user_query: Can you analyze the working days in the month of October for my friend's company? The start date is October 1st and the end date is October 31st. Also, add 2 hours of working time to the start date of October 1st at 9:00 AM. Evaluate the expression '($1500 - $100)'.

TaskList.description: Calculate the number of working days in October from October 1st to October 31st.
Add 2 hours of working time to the start date of October 1st at 9:00 AM.
